# Merkle Patricia Trie Example

Sorted input (descending):

```
11111001
11110010
11100011
11001000
10110011
10100110
10100011
10011111
01110111
01101110
01011001
01001001
00100111
00010111
00010000
00001110
```

```
0: 11111001: 0-11111001
       |
1: 11110010: 0-11111001 1-11110010
      |
2: 11100011: 01-11110010 2-11100011
     |
3: 11001000: (01)2-11100011 3-11001000
    |
4: 10110011: ((01)2)3-11001000 4-10110011
      |
5: 10100110: ((01)2)3-11001000 4-10110011 5-10100110
        |
6: 10100011: ((01)2)3-11001000 4-10110011 5-10100110 6-10100011
     |
7: 10011111: ((01)2)3-11001000 4(56)-10100011 7-10011111
   |
8: 01110111: (((01)2)3)((4(56))7)-10011111 8-01110111
      |
9: 01101110: (((01)2)3)((4(56))7)-10011111 8-01110111 9-01101110
     |
A: 01011001: (((01)2)3)((4(56))7)-10011111 89-01101110 A-01011001
      |
B: 01001001: (((01)2)3)((4(56))7)-10011111 89-01101110 A-01011001 B-01001001
    |
C: 00100111: (((01)2)3)((4(56))7)-10011111 (89)(AB)-01001001 C-00100111
     |
D: 00010111: (((01)2)3)((4(56))7)-10011111 (89)(AB)-01001001 C-00100111 D-00010111
       |
E: 00010000: (((01)2)3)((4(56))7)-10011111 (89)(AB)-01001001 C-00100111 D-00010111 E-00010000
      |
F: 00001110: (((01)2)3)((4(56))7)-10011111 (89)(AB)-01001001 C-00100111 DE-00010000 F-00001110
```
